assertions.assertion: Output identifies RequirePkce = true as a required control and warns against setting it to false
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Pattern 4 and Core Principle 3 explicitly state 'PKCE is Non-Negotiable' and 'never disable it'

assertions.assertion: Output identifies exact-match fully-qualified redirect URIs with no wildcards as required
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Core Principle 5 states 'Wildcards in redirect URIs are a critical attack surface. Every production URI must be fully qualified and must match exactly'

assertions.assertion: Output identifies restricting grant types to only what a client needs (principle of least grant) and removing implicit flow
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Core Principle 6 states 'Restrict Grant Types Per Client' and Pattern 7 explicitly deprecates implicit flow
